title: cajanus mollis
intro: Cajanus mollis, also known as the pinto bean tree or Adzuki bean tree, is a plant species native to Australia and Southeast Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Cajanus mollis include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestive health, and act as an antioxidant. It can be prepared into various herbal forms, including teas, capsules, and infusions, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized in different ways.
